recommended_actions.action: HUMAN REVIEW: Verify prediction verdict restorations are correct — W019=falsified, W020=falsified, PRED-NEW-002=standard_physics, PRED-TOROID-003=standard_physics. Check the curmudgeon PRED-batch-2026-04-18 review for full reasoning.

ISS-1199: Fix workflow gap — decider integration should cross-check closed-issues.json. Simple guard: skip analyst assessment integration if predictions.json verdict_history last entry is newer than assessment file. Prevents recurrence of 209fda5 class of regression.
ISS-1192: WIN-019 stronger argument (8-cusped epicycloid) — one-sentence addition to detail_evidence Code-level corroboration block. Reduces defense rating from 2/5 to 1/5.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Pipeline Integrity: Four Prediction Verdicts Restored After Silent Regression
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Decider commit 209fda5 silently reverted four human-approved prediction verdicts on 2026-04-18. Verdicts restored this run: W019=falsified, W020=falsified, PRED-NEW-002/TOROID-003=standard_physics. The regression lasted ~42 hours on the live site. Root cause: stale analyst assessments (2026-04-11) overrode human decisions (2026-04-14) because integration code didn't cross-check closed-issues.json.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Pipeline integrity incident — human-approved decisions overridden by automation. Relevant to a reader evaluating the review's reliability.
